title: Static Blaster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Static Blasters''' were a type of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] that fired condensed electricity rather than blaster bolts. These niche weapons were useful for subduing foes resistant to traditional weaponry, such as [[Veermok/Legends|veermoks]], and were additionally useful for being able to bypass [[Personal energy shield|energy shields]] not designed to stop electric current.

Notable models were almost entirely originally designed by [[Systech Corporation/Legends|Systech Corporation]], in the form of the [[Systech electric blaster]], and, later, in the form of the [[SSB-1 Static Pistol/Legends|SSB-1 Static Pistol]]—a modern Static Blaster produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] by redesigning old Systech designs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
